cleavage agent: digestion with rLys-C was carried out prior to trypsin treatment
fractionation method: we employed sucrose density gradient centrifugation (SDGC)
fragmentation method: followed by 3 second data-dependent HCD-MS/MS scans
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribid mass spectrometer
ionization type: using a Nano Easy-Spray Ion Source
labeling: the area under the curve for the precursor ions was used to calculate the relative fold change between different peptide ions
